about.title: About
about.bio: MSc AI Applied to Business student at Eugenia School Paris, I combine artificial intelligence expertise with a passion for sports business. My approach: turning data into strategic decisions.

items.title: Jungle Gather
items.description: Immersive web app inspired by Gather for social dynamics and planning in multi-site companies. Pixel-art interface, interactive calendar, remote/office attendance management.

items.title: Carrefour Brand Verification
items.description: Sophisticated trademark ownership verification system using AI to analyze and validate brand-owner relationships. Confidence score computation and parallel processing.

items.title: Novarena
items.description: Integrated intelligent management suite for modern stadiums: performance & analytics, fan management, talent management, and business & sponsoring. Multi-region cloud-native architecture.

items.title: Pythia
items.description: Football analytics platform scraping FBref data. Player performance metrics, injury risk prediction, league comparisons and recruitment scoring — interactive dashboards built from multiple project iterations.

items.title: Payfit AI Pipeline
items.description: Multi-agent AI pipeline built for Payfit: automated SEO content production (competitor analysis, legal compliance check, EEAT optimization, DatoCMS publishing) + HR cost calculators for lead gen + GEO brand scoring across GPT-4, Claude, Gemini, Llama and Copilot.

items.title: NARA
items.description: All-in-one platform for content creators: AI contract analysis (Guardians), automated invoicing & revenue dashboards (Flow), intelligent email classification by collaboration type (Orbit). Built with React/TypeScript, Supabase and N8N + Dust AI agents.

items.title: AImobbilier
items.description: 3-day project building multi-sector AI agent systems on Dust. Real estate focus: property evaluation, market comparison and ROI agents. Scored and ranked 6 industry verticals (real estate, luxury, agtech, sports) by impact and feasibility.

items.title: BINKO
items.description: Synthetic image dataset generator for waste classification ML training. Parametric prompt engine simulating real user photos (lighting, camera, perspective). 3-phase async pipeline: FLUX Schnell testing → FLEX 1.1 Pro production → augmentation. Cost optimizer built-in.

items.title: Athlete Performance
items.desc: Predictive performance analysis and injury prevention

items.title: Business Intelligence
items.desc: Dashboards and KPIs for strategic decisions

items.title: AI Strategy & Integration
items.desc: From data audit to production deployment.

items.title: Predictive Analytics
items.desc: Custom ML models for business forecasting.

items.title: Product Design (AI-first)
items.desc: Wireframes to prototype with AI embedded.
